meta.title: Motorcycle parts & dealers along this route
meta.disclaimer: Research snapshot for trip planning — not an endorsement. Hours, phone numbers, and brands change; call before you detour. “Authorized Suzuki” means OEM parts counter access for most DR650 wear items; exotic or aftermarket DR parts may still need mail-order.
meta.bikeFocus: Suzuki DR650 — prioritize authorized Suzuki parts counters, dual-sport–friendly independents, and mega retailers with metric inventory.

howToUse: Use the jump links to open the corridor you are in or about to enter.

For DR650: ask for oil filter, air filter, spark plug (NGK per manual), tubes, chain/sprockets, brake pads — carry OEM or aftermarket part numbers in your phone (ProCycle, manual, or forum cheat sheet).
Independent shops without Suzuki auth may still wrench a DR; they may not stock OEM Suzuki small parts same-day.
Nationwide: suzukicycles.com/dealers is the official dealer locator if you need a backup not listed here.

regions.name: Ontario — start & finish
regions.corridor: Home base and last night before Toronto — best place to pre-stock spares.

shops.name: Powersports T.O.
shops.dr650Note: Toronto-area Suzuki dealer — OEM parts counter; good first stop for filters and fluids before the border.

shops.name: Inglis Cycle Center
shops.dr650Note: Authorized Suzuki — parts/service; useful if you stage a final service or pickup near London.

regions.name: New York — Finger Lakes & NYC corridor
regions.corridor: I-90 / Thruway and down toward NJ — upstate + metro options.

shops.name: Sport-Mann Suzuki (North Syracuse)
shops.dr650Note: Upstate Suzuki dealer — OEM parts; north of Ithaca/Finger Lakes.
shops.address: 6225 E Taft Rd, North Syracuse, NY 13212

shops.name: RevZilla Brooklyn (gear & retail)
shops.dr650Note: Comoto/RevZilla showroom — riding gear, common consumables; not a full Suzuki OEM counter; call for in-stock tires/chains.
shops.address: 25 Hall St Bldg I, Brooklyn, NY 11205

regions.name: Mid-Atlantic — DC / Maryland / NoVA

shops.name: Coleman Powersports (Falls Church)
shops.dr650Note: Large DC-area dealer group — Suzuki among many lines; parts counter for OEM.
shops.address: 435 S Washington St, Falls Church, VA 22046

shops.name: Coleman Powersports (Woodbridge)
shops.dr650Note: Second Coleman location — same idea; pick whichever is closer to your routing.

shops.name: Heyser Cycle
shops.dr650Note: Maryland Suzuki inventory — useful if you hug MD vs VA.

shops.name: Cycle Gear (Plano)

shops.name: Lone Star Powersports — Amarillo

regions.name: New Mexico & Colorado — Albuquerque, Four Corners, San Juans

shops.name: Team R&S Powersports (Lomas)

shops.name: Fun Center (Durango)

regions.name: Utah & Arizona — Page, Bryce, Moab, St. George

shops.name: Honda Suzuki of Salt Lake
shops.dr650Note: Major Wasatch Front Suzuki — useful if you detour to I-15 / SLC.
shops.address: 2354 S State St, Salt Lake City, UT 84115

shops.name: Mad Bro Powersports
shops.dr650Note: Moab’s large powersports shop — metric/dual-sport friendly; call for DR tubes/filters stock.

shops.name: Factory Powersports (St. George)
shops.dr650Note: Southern UT Suzuki dealer — OEM parts before California.
shops.address: 1685 E Red Hills Pkwy, St. George, UT 84770

shops.name: Chaparral Motorsports

mailOrderAndOem.title: Mail-order, OEM & DR specialists (ship ahead or home)

items.name: ProCycle (DR650 aftermarket specialist)
items.note: DR-specific seats, tanks, guards, jet kits — the reference catalog for many DR650 builds.

items.name: Rocky Mountain ATV/MC
items.note: Massive aftermarket; overnight to many hotels; Payson UT will-call if you time it.

items.name: Suzuki Cycles — dealer & parts locator
items.note: Official USA dealer finder + OEM accessory catalog pointers.

items.name: Partzilla / OEM parts sellers
items.note: OEM diagrams — useful when you have a part number from the manual.

items.name: BikeBandit
items.note: OEM/aftermarket mix — compare shipping to your route.

nationalRetail.title: National retail chains (gear, tires, common service items)
nationalRetail.note: Inventory is store-specific — always call. Often stronger for tires, chain tools, and fluids than for obscure DR650 OEM hardware.

stores.name: Cycle Gear / Comoto
stores.note: Many US locations — use store locator; Plano TX listed under Texas region.

stores.name: RevZilla retail
stores.note: Brooklyn, Denver, Costa Mesa showrooms — gear-heavy.

findingMore: Search: “dual sport motorcycle repair” + city — independents often stock tubes and metric chains.
ADVRider regional forums — rider vetted shops in Moab, Spokane, etc.
If stranded: larger Honda/Kawasaki/Yamaha dealers often service simple DR work (tires, brakes) even without Suzuki franchise.
